docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ROBERT MARTIN KISSEL RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUERRERO, ROGELIO

IF NOT DISMISSED BEFORE 12/11/96 APPEARANCE IS MANDATORY. HEARING SET FOR DEC-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
